title: Parck family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
A '''family''' was a military bloodline from [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] with a tradition of naval service. [[Voss Parck/Legends|Voss Parck]] was the most well-known member of the family, though he also had a [[Voss Parck's cousin|cousin]] who achieved the rank of vice admiral within the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. Voss Parck's [[Voss Parck's father|father]] and [[Voss Parck's grandfather|grandfather]] were also naval captains.
